items: Output preserves the three-step form structure rather than redesigning the flow into a different pattern.
Output adds a progress indicator with step numbering or step labels.
Output makes the Next action visually distinct from the Back action.
Output places errors inline at the field and includes at least one specific actionable error message example.
Output keeps labels visible above inputs rather than relying on placeholder-only labeling.
Output states or demonstrates 44x44 minimum touch targets.
Output ensures the Back path remains available or explicitly prevents dead ends.
Output stays within Vue 3 + Vite + Tailwind CSS v3 and uses the existing Vesta components rather than replacing the stack.
Output identifies at least one current UX problem before proposing the fix.
Output avoids introducing a new animation library.
